body:
https://enzyme.expasy.org/EC/1.13.11.37
Entry: EC:1.13.11.37
Accepted Name: hydroxyquinol 1,2-dioxygenase
Reaction catalysed: benzene-1,2,4-triol + O2 <=> 2 H(+) + maleylacetate

That EC is currently on two GO terms (shown below), it's an exact match for the second one (GO:0047074) that describes the 'complete 2-step reaction', but should only be a 'broadMatch' for the first one (GO:0018581) that only describes the first step of the reaction. (The second step in non-enzymatic conversion of 3-hydroxy-cis,cis-muconate to maleylacetate - see https://biocyc.org/META/NEW-IMAGE?type=REACTION&object=RXN-10137)
Tasks:
- [x] Make EC:1.13.11.37 xref on GO:0018581 a 'broadMatch'
- [x] Remove EC:1.13.11.37-attributed synonyms from GO:0018581 (EC:1.13.11.37 currently doesn't list any synonyms)
- [x] Change GO:0018581 def attribution to use RHEA:19441
- [x] Make EC:1.13.11.37 xref on GO:0047074 a 'exactMatch'
- [x] Tweak GO:0047074 def to match EC:1.13.11.37 def


id: GO:0018581
name: hydroxyquinol 1,2-dioxygenase activity
def: "Catalysis of the reaction: benzene-1,2,4-triol + O2 = 3-hydroxy-cis,cis-muconate." [EC:1.13.11.37]
synonym: "benzene-1,2,4-triol:oxygen 1,2-oxidoreductase (decyclizing)" RELATED [EC:1.13.11.37]
synonym: "hydroxyquinol dioxygenase activity" RELATED [EC:1.13.11.37]
xref: EC:1.13.11.37
xref: MetaCyc:HYDROXYQUINOL-12-DIOXYGENASE-RXN
xref: RHEA:19441
xref: UM-BBD_reactionID:r0232
is_a: GO:0016702 ! oxidoreductase activity, acting on single donors with incorporation of molecular oxygen, incorporation of two atoms of oxygen

id: GO:0047074
name: 4-hydroxycatechol 1,2-dioxygenase activity
namespace: molecular_function
def: "Catalysis of the reaction: O2 + benzene-1,2,4-triol = maleylacetate." [RHEA:35595]
xref: EC:1.13.11.37
xref: MetaCyc:R308-RXN
xref: MetaCyc:RXN-10137
xref: RHEA:35595
is_a: GO:0016702 ! oxidoreductase activity, acting on single donors with incorporation of molecular oxygen, incorporation of two atoms of oxygen

comments.body:
Also:

- [x] MetaCyc:HYDROXYQUINOL-12-DIOXYGENASE-RXN is obsolete. Replace with RXN-17556.
- [x] MetaCyc:R308-RXN is obsolete. Remove.

Looking at this one again, we should:
- [x] Obsolete GO:0018581, because it's a sub-reaction of RHEA:35595 (it has 0 GO annotations anyway)
- [x] Then rename GO:0047074 to "hydroxyquinol 1,2-dioxygenase activity" (the name currently on GO:0018581), since that's the EC name.

Dear all, 

The proposal has been made to obsolete GO:0018581 hydroxyquinol 1,2-dioxygenase activity

* The reason for obsoletion is that this term is equivalent to GO:0047074 4-hydroxycatechol 1,2-dioxygenase activity

There are no experimental annotations to this term.
There are no mappings to this term.
This term is not present in any subset.
This term is being replaced by GO:0047074 4-hydroxycatechol 1,2-dioxygenase activity

Any comments can be  added to the issue: https://github.com/geneontology/go-ontology/issues/25870.

Thanks,
@dragon-ai-agent please Obsolete GO:0018581 and then rename GO:0047074 to "hydroxyquinol 1,2-dioxygenase activity".

🤖 Working on it...

Follow along: [View workflow run](https://github.com/geneontology/go-ontology/actions/runs/25075714761)

*— @dragon-ai-agent*

title: GO terms with EC:1.13.11.37 xref
